title: Build sources.yaml license register (>=10 sources, verified, ingest flags)
context: Before any ingestion, every candidate data source must have its license, access tier, and an ingest:true|false switch verified and recorded so the catalog never re-publishes controlled or non-open data as if it were open (PLAN section 7, M0). This register is the code-enforced authority for what may be ingested versus referenced-only. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author sources.yaml registering >=10 data sources, each with license, license URL, access tier, ingest flag, and verifier+date, encoding the reference-only vs. ingestible policy.
acceptanceCriteria: >=10 sources, each with license, license URL, access tier, ingest:true|false, verifier + date.
COSMIC, OncoKB, ATCC/DSMZ marked ingest:false (reference-only); dbGaP/EGA marked out-of-scope.
Cellosaurus/DepMap confirmed CC BY 4.0; PDCM Finder/PDMR/CCDI/CSTN terms verified or flagged "needs confirmation" (not silently assumed).
output: sources.yaml committed with >=10 sources, per-source license/access-tier/ingest flags, and verifier+date provenance.
